title: SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES - 211info
text: SOUTHEAST OFFICE SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to older adults, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers. Services include Medicaid case management, SNAP/food stamps administration, and transportation. 4610 SE Belmont Street 2nd Floor Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-3660 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 988-3660 Main phone (503) 988-3784 FAX (503) 988-6026 TTY/TTD Main phone (503) 988-3660 FAX (503) 988-3784 TTY/TTD (503) 988-6026 Adult Protective Services (503) 988-4450 Reporting Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None for most programs DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County south of Burnside, east of the Willamette River, and west of 82nd Avenue (parts of zip codes 97202, 97206, 97214, and 97215) Services: Case/Care Management * Medicaid Recipients Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Food Stamps/SNAP * Veterans Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Medicaid * Veterans Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TRANSITION AND DIVERSION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTHEAST OFFICE
